title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD (Pixel Diffusion) is Nvidia's open-source AI model designed for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates PiD workflows in ComfyUI, comparing its performance to alternatives like SeedVR2, and provides installation and usage tutorials.
